title: Pyrimido[4,5-b]indol derivatives as pdhk1 inhibitors
abstract: The present invention relates to piperidine derivatives of formula (I) wherein R 1 , and R 2 are as described in the description, their preparation, to pharmaceutically acceptable salts thereof, and to their use as pharmaceuticals, to pharmaceutical compositions containing one or more compounds of formula (I), and especially to their use as inhibitors of the pyruvate dehydrogenase kinase PDHK1 and/or as modulators of the immunometabolism.
